project.name: White Saffron Bills Tracker
project.purpose: Bill entry, viewing, export, dashboard analysis, and future AI librarian support.

read_first: AI_BRAIN_GUIDE.md only for backend AI work

index.html.description: Complete deployed app: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Supabase client, auth, bills, dashboard, admin AI view.
index.html.deployment_impact: Any change affects the live GitHub Pages app after cache refresh.

librarian.html.description: Admin-only static AI Librarian Monitor with project search, local usage tracking, anomaly warnings, and 24-hour evolution report generation.

README.md.description: Project structure, features, Supabase columns, deployment notes.

AI_LIBRARIAN.md.description: Read-first project map for future AI/code assistants.

AI_BRAIN_GUIDE.md.description: Plan for real backend AI chat, insights, predictions, and anomalies.

PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE.json.description: Structured index for an admin Librarian search/chat dashboard.

row_count_context.source: latest user screenshots and app status text

supabase.rls_warning: Do not use auth.uid() = user_id as the only SELECT policy if imported shared bills without user_id must remain visible.

current_behavior.batch_loading: Loads Supabase rows in 1000-row ranges until complete.
current_behavior.status_logic: Blank imported bills dated up to today display as Paid. New bills default to Pending.
current_behavior.mobile_priority: Vendor name is prominent; amount is smaller on the right.
current_behavior.admin_ai: Admin-only smart insight view. It hides bill actions, stats, and filters before showing insight cards.
current_behavior.ai_librarian_daily_report: librarian.html generates a local 24-hour evolution report from admin searches, weak matches, repeated questions, risky questions, and average lookup time.

code_map.SUPABASE_KEY: Publishable frontend key only. Never replace with service role key.
code_map.roleFor: Determines admin vs staff after login.
code_map.isAdmin: Admin helper used for UI permissions.
code_map.keys: Column compatibility map for CSV-style and app-style names.
code_map.parseDate: Handles imported d/m/yyyy dates and normal Date parsing.
code_map.category: Automatic category guess from category/vendor/bill number text.
code_map.canEdit: UI edit/delete rule, including staff 24-hour window.
code_map.renderStats: Top stats and admin record text.
code_map.switchView: Dashboard, Bills, and AI view switching.
code_map.makeDailyReport: librarian.html function that summarizes recent Librarian usage into a 24-hour report.
code_map.renderReport: librarian.html function that displays the latest daily evolution report.
code_map.riskLevel: librarian.html function that flags risky admin search words.

change_bill_filter.warning: Keep this-year default unless user asks otherwise.

change_mobile_bill_card.warning: Vendor should stay easy to identify; amount should not dominate mobile.

hide_from_staff.warning: Frontend hiding is not full security.

change_ai_tab.warning: Current AI tab is smart analysis only, not hosted chat AI.

edit: new backend or Supabase Edge Function
add_real_ai_chat.warning: Never put OPENAI_API_KEY or service role key in index.html.

change_export.warning: Keep useful CSV headers for bill records.

add_bill_field.warning: Database column must exist or Supabase insert/update will fail.

daily_evolution_report.warning: V1 report is local browser storage only. For automatic 24-hour delivery, add a backend, Supabase table, and scheduled job.

edit: Supabase Edge Function or backend cron
report_every_24_hours.warning: Static GitHub Pages cannot send reports by itself when the browser is closed.

librarian_dashboard_v1.goal: Admin-only project help page that answers where to edit without calling backend AI.
features: search feature names and code areas
record recent local searches in browser localStorage
show simple stats like knowledge files, functions indexed, and recent searches
generate a 24-hour evolution report from weak matches, repeated questions, risky questions, and lookup time

librarian_dashboard_v2.goal: Real hosted AI librarian with chat, monitoring, and automatic daily reports.
requires: backend service or Supabase Edge Function
logs table or server memory for query events
optional WebSocket or polling for live dashboard

do_not_break: Do not expose service role keys or AI provider keys in browser code.
Do not remove CSV-style column compatibility unless the database is migrated.
Do not make staff see admin AI or AI Librarian.
Do not load only 1000 records; keep batch loading.
Do not assume every imported bill has user_id.
Do not convert to React/Vite/Node unless the user explicitly asks.
Do not claim V1 daily reports are automatic server reports; they are generated in the admin browser until V2 exists.

bills_not_loading: Check Supabase RLS policies for public.bills.
Check Data API grants for anon and authenticated roles.
Confirm table is still named bills.
Confirm columns still match keys map.
ai_tab_missing: Confirm body gets class admin after login.
Confirm AI nav button has admin-only class.
daily_report_empty: Ask the Librarian a few questions first.
Confirm localStorage is not blocked by the browser.
For automatic delivery, implement backend V2 scheduled reports.
